info.title: Propalt API
info.description: Propalt API schema optimised for Custom GPT Actions. Use Bearer token authentication via the Authorization header in the GPT Actions configuration. Replace the server URL with your public Zuplo gateway if needed.

servers.description: Replace with your public Zuplo gateway base URL

get.description: Health check — verifies the API is up and the database is reachable.

200.description: API and database status

post.description: Find UK sale listings in one area. Provide exactly one area selector: first_postcode, sector_code_list (max 4), or polygon_str (max 15 sq miles). Use progress and filters for tenure, type, beds, ownership, EPC/tax band, size, dates, price, HMO, accessibility, or retirement; return count or data.

200.description: ListResponse containing count plus matching sale property records. For return_type='count', data is empty; for return_type='data', data contains up to limit SellingPropertyOutput records.

post.description: Find UK rental listings in one area. Provide exactly one area selector: first_postcode, sector_code_list (max 4), or polygon_str (max 15 sq miles). Use progress and filters for tenure, type, beds, ownership, EPC, size, dates, rent, HMO, accessibility, or retirement; return count or data.

200.description: ListResponse containing count plus matching letting property records. For return_type='count', data is empty; for return_type='data', data contains up to limit LettingPropertyOutput records.

post.description: Find landlord/proprietor audiences for properties in one UK area. Provide one area selector: first_postcode, sector_code_list (max 4), or polygon_str (max 15 sq miles). Filter by area ownership, linked agents, director age/count, portfolio size, proprietor type, purchases, sale/rental listings.

200.description: ListResponse containing count plus matching landlord records. For return_type='count', data is empty; for return_type='data', data contains up to limit LandlordsOutput records.

get.description: Use for UK address lookup. Send keyword as a full postcode, outward code, local authority name, or free-text address. Set address to any truthy value to force full-text address search. Returns status and data; each result is an address, postcode, first_postcode, or authority item.

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: Search term. Determines the search strategy: full postcode (e.g. 'SW1A 1AA'), outward code (e.g. 'SW1A'), local authority name (e.g. 'BRISTOL'), or free-text address (e.g. '10 Downing Street'). Special characters other than letters, digits, spaces, commas, hyphens, apostrophes, and periods are stripped.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: When present (any truthy value), forces Typesense full-text address search regardless of keyword format.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max results to return. Typesense default: 7; postcode suggestions default: 10.

200.description: List of address, postcode, first_postcode, or authority results

post.description: Use for UK street or location search when the user provides query text. Returns up to 5 Google Places matches with formatted address, latitude and longitude, and the viewport converted to a closed WKT polygon.

200.description: Top Google Places street/location results with WKT viewport polygons

GetComparableByPropertyIdInput.title: GetComparableByPropertyIdInput
GetComparableByPropertyIdInput.description:
Input for get_comparable_by_property_id endpoint.

Looks up property features from DB by property_id, then merges with
optional client overrides (client values take priority when not null).

Cross-validation rules (applied after DB merge in the endpoint):
- If property_type is 'bungalow' or 'house', built_form must be one of: detached, semi_detached, terraced.
- If property_type is 'flat', built_form must be one of: flat, maisonette, studio.

Note on postcode: accepts outward code only (e.g. 'SA11', 'NW3'), case-insensitive.

GetValuationByPropertyIdInput.title: GetValuationByPropertyIdInput
GetValuationByPropertyIdInput.description:
Input for get_valuation_by_property_id endpoint.

Looks up property features from DB by property_id, then merges with
optional client overrides (client values take priority when not null).

Cross-validation rules (applied after DB merge in the endpoint):
- If property_type is 'bungalow' or 'house', built_form must be one of: detached, semi_detached, terraced.
- If property_type is 'flat', built_form must be one of: flat, maisonette, studio.

Note on postcode: accepts outward code only (e.g. 'SA11', 'NW3'), case-insensitive.

subject_property_feature.description: The subject property features used for the valuation.

running_id.title: Running Id
running_id.description: Unique identifier for this valuation run.
